title: Market Hours Hook — The Codebase Explained
author: UHI10 build notes
description: The complete deep-dive into the first UHI10 build: an AMM that knows when Wall Street is closed. The problem (weekend LVR, no circuit breakers, the Monday-open massacre), every concept it uses (dynamic fees, Q96 price math, flash accounting, on-chain DST-correct date math), then NYSECalendar.sol and MarketHoursHook.sol line by line — including the internal-crossing reopening auction — plus what every test proves and how the deployment and demo UI work.
